description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Sleep.csv' is already open in JASP. This dataset contains data from a classic sleep study (Student/Gosset 1908) with 20 participants split into two groups (group 1 and group 2), measuring extra hours of sleep ('extra' column). Generate descriptive statistics for the 'extra' variable split by 'group', including the Mean, Standard Deviation, Minimum, Maximum, and Median.
